infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera access is not used by this app.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationUsageDescription: We'll notify you when your order is ready for collection.
infoPlist.NFCReaderUsageDescription: Tap your phone to the NFC chip inside the box lid to verify your order and activate your membership.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We use your location to show collection points near you.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: We use your location in the background to notify you when you're near a collection point so you can tap your box.
